core_mechanism: large-N matrix-model partition function organized as a topological genus expansion in powers of 1/N^2, where the N->infinity (planar) limit yields the leading-order combinatorial structure and successive 1/N^2 corrections systematically enumerate higher-genus (non-planar) contributions
brief_reason: The abstract recasts the problem as an NxN matrix field theory, classifies partition-function terms by topological character, takes N->infinity for the leading (planar) structure, and computes 1/N^2 corrections to generate the higher-topology terms.
